name: @smoothbricks/typescript-api
description: Bun-safe TypeScript 6 compiler API for bare require("typescript"). Avoids https://github.com/oven-sh/bun/issues/33834 (nested npm:typescript alias collapses onto @typescript/typescript6). Keep main/types only — nested package.json exports are ignored by Node and rejected by publint when shipped under packages/cli/managed.
